articles.title: Cory Sandhagen says loss to Aljamain Sterling was TOUGHEST MOMENT of his UFC career | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by UFC Bantamweight Cory Sandhagen, where he talks about fighting Aljamain Sterling in a title eliminator fight back in 2020. Cory lost in the first round, and he talks about how that was the toughest moment of his career as it was his first loss in the UFC, and first time ever being finished. Cory was within an arms reach of UFC Gold, and was dominated by Aljo. Cory talks about how that fight helped him mentally for the rest of his career, and how to move forward after a loss. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Cory Sandagen says he DOESN’T LIKE HURTING PEOPLE, despite being UFC KO artist | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by UFC Bantamweight Cory Sandhagen, where he talks about the mental strategy to fighting and what drives him to compete every day. Cory talks about how he actually hates hurting people, despite participating in the most violent sport there is. Cory focuses solely on improving skills, and taking the approach that this is just a sport, rather than that he is trying to hurt another man. articles.title: Cory Sandhagen on CALLING OUT Sean O’Malley: “I’ll OUT STRIKE O’Malley” | The Daniel Cormier Show
articles.description: Daniel Cormier is joined by UFC Bantamweight Cory Sandhagen on The Daniel Cormier Show where Cory talks about CALLING OUT former champion “Suga” Sean O’Malley. Cory has been calling out Sean for a while now, and he says that Suga is DUCKING him. Cory thinks it is the fight that makes the most sense for both of them, and he thinks he will out strike him and out wrestle him. Cory says he will not stop calling him out until he gets the fight. articles.title: Cory Sandhagen on Sean O'Malley callout, Aljo & Merab losses, pursuit of UFC title | Daniel Cormier
articles.description: DC is BACK with another edition of the Daniel Cormier Show, this time featuring one of the most talented bantamweights in the UFC today, Cory Sandhagen. Cory talks about his upbringing in Colorado, and switching from basketball to fighting in his later teenage years. DC and Sandhagen also go back and look at his UFC career and the tough losses he had to take to Aljamain Sterling and Merab Dvalishvili in hopes to obtain a UFC championship. Plus, Cory dives into his callout of Sean O'Malley and why he feels he is deserving of that White House fight against Suga. Plus, check out Sandhagen talk about his journey to the UFC, and how his mental approach to the sport is so different than most people in the fight game. All lines provided by @hardrockbet Follow me on all social media platforms! articles.title: Daniel Cormier & Ben Askren on Colby Covington, Ngannou & Rousey CARD REVEALED, DC's INSANE theory
articles.description: Ben Askren IS BACK with Daniel Cormier for another edition of Funky and the Champ, this time fresh off of Jake Paul's MVP Promotions announcing their May 16 Netflix fight card that features Ronda Rousey, Francis Ngannou, and Nate Diaz. Askren and Cormier also get into Colby Covington speaking out against fighter pay, and DC talks about exactly why his comments on the video game payouts weren't valid. Plus, don't miss DC's INSANE THEORY on being able to be good at anything he does including his false statement about beating Ben Askren in a disc golf competition.
